header.title: 🎤 UltraStar Song List Generator
header.subtitle: Configure your settings and generate a PDF song list

labels.includeInPdf: What to include in the PDF

tooltips.formatDbRequirement: If your format includes h (high score), the database is required and enabled automatically.
tooltips.jobDbRequirement: Selecting Songs with a Score or Songs without a Score requires the database and enables it automatically.
tooltips.smallFont: Used when an entry exceeds the Too Long Threshold value.
tooltips.databasePath: The database file should be named Ultrastar.db. It is typically located at C:\Users\[YourUsername]\AppData\Roaming\ultrastardx\Ultrastar.db

hints.format: Codes separated by '.' — append 'b' for bold | 'x' inserts literal text that follows until the next '.'
hints.dbRequired: Database loading is required for the selected format/job.
hints.dbNotRequired: Database loading is not required for the selected format/job.

group.artist: Group entries by Artist (prints a bold header per artist)

status.pickFailed: Could not open the native file picker.
status.pickFailedWithMessage: Could not open the native file picker: {message}
